languages.text: "Погоди. Ты упомянул две попытки? Была еще одна Триасомата?"
"Wait. You mentioned two attempts? There was another Triasomata?"
languages.original_text: "Погоди. Ты упомянул две попытки? Была еще одна Триасомата?"

traits.locale_text: "Wait. You mentioned two attempts? There was another Triasomata?"
"Wait. You mentioned two attempts? There was another Triasomata?"
"Wait. You mentioned two attempts? There was another Triasomata?"

languages.text: "Wartet. Ihr habt zwei Versuche erwähnt. Es gab noch einen Triasomata?"
languages.original_text: "Wait. You mentioned two attempts? There was another Triasomata?"

traits.locale_text: "Wartet. Ihr habt zwei Versuche erwähnt. Es gab noch einen Triasomata?"

languages.text: « Attendez. Vous avez parlé de deux tentatives ? Il y avait un autre Triasomata ? »
languages.original_text: "Wait. You mentioned two attempts? There was another Triasomata?"

traits.locale_text: « Attendez. Vous avez parlé de deux tentatives ? Il y avait un autre Triasomata ? »

languages.text: “等等，你是说两次尝试？也就是说还有另一个三相体？”
languages.original_text: "Wait. You mentioned two attempts? There was another Triasomata?"

traits.locale_text: “等等，你是说两次尝试？也就是说还有另一个三相体？”

languages.text: «Espere, ha mencionado dos intentos. Entonces, ¿hubo otro triasómata?».
languages.original_text: "Wait. You mentioned two attempts? There was another Triasomata?"

traits.locale_text: «Espere, ha mencionado dos intentos. Entonces, ¿hubo otro triasómata?».

languages.text: "待てよ、2回挑戦したと言ったが？もう一人トリアソマタがいたのか？"
languages.original_text: "Wait. You mentioned two attempts? There was another Triasomata?"

languages.text: "Bekle. İki girişim mi dedin? Başka bir Üçyeköz daha mı vardı?"
languages.original_text: "Wait. You mentioned two attempts? There was another Triasomata?"

traits.locale_text: "Bekle. İki girişim mi dedin? Başka bir Üçyeköz daha mı vardı?"
